old_string:
logic [3:0]  tx_state;      // FSM state register
    logic [3:0]  bit_cnt;       // Bit period counter (0-15)
    logic [2:0]  bit_index;     // Data bit index (0-7)
    logic [7:0]  tx_buffer;     // Current byte being transmitted
    logic [7:0]  lcr_latch;     // LCR latched at frame start
    logic        parity_bit;    // Pre-computed parity bit
    logic        tx_fifo_pop;   // FIFO read request (1-cycle pulse)
    logic [7:0]  fifo_rd_data;  // FIFO read data
    logic        fifo_empty;    // FIFO empty flag (from sub-module)
    logic        fifo_full;     // FIFO full flag (from sub-module)
    logic [4:0]  fifo_count;   // FIFO data count (from sub-module)
    logic [7:0]  data_mask;     // Mask for sub-8-bit data
    logic        parity_en;     // Parity enable (from lcr_latch[3])
    logic        parity_xor;    // XOR reduction of masked tx_buffer
    logic [1:0]  data_bits_enc; // Data bits encoding (lcr_latch[1:0])
    logic        stop_bits_en;  // Stop bits enable (lcr_latch[2])
    logic [1:0]  parity_type;   // Parity type (lcr_latch[5:4])
new_string:
reg [3:0]  tx_state;      // FSM state register
    reg [3:0]  bit_cnt;       // Bit period counter (0-15)
    reg [2:0]  bit_index;     // Data bit index (0-7)
    reg [7:0]  tx_buffer;     // Current byte being transmitted
    reg [7:0]  lcr_latch;     // LCR latched at frame start
    reg        parity_bit;    // Pre-computed parity bit
    reg        tx_fifo_pop;   // FIFO read request (1-cycle pulse)
    wire [7:0]  fifo_rd_data;  // FIFO read data
    wire        fifo_empty;    // FIFO empty flag (from sub-module)
    wire        fifo_full;     // FIFO full flag (from sub-module)
    wire [4:0]  fifo_count;   // FIFO data count (from sub-module)
    reg [7:0]  data_mask;     // Mask for sub-8-bit data
    wire        parity_en;     // Parity enable (from lcr_latch[3])
    wire        parity_xor;    // XOR reduction of masked tx_buffer
    wire [1:0]  data_bits_enc; // Data bits encoding (lcr_latch[1:0])
    wire        stop_bits_en;  // Stop bits enable (lcr_latch[2])
    wire [1:0]  parity_type;   // Parity type (lcr_latch[5:4])
